name: minicpm5-1b-support-edge
description: W921 NOW-1 edge-student recipe: distill a black-box API teacher council into openbmb/MiniCPM5-1B (Apache-2.0, dense sub-2B, native tool-calling/MCP, ~0.5 GB at INT4) for a runs-on-a-phone signed .kolm. Uses sequence-level KD on teacher TEXT (no logits) so it works with API teachers today; upgrade distill.objective to 'ropd' (rubric-based on-policy) once available. MiniCPM5-1B carries custom modeling code, so load + quantize with --trust-remote-code. Target INT4 NF4+double (the bitsandbytes path applies — dense architecture).

distill.note: seqKD = sequence-level KD on teacher text (no logits) — works with black-box API teachers. Upgrade to objective:'ropd' (rubric-based on-policy) when the trainer ships it.

system_prompt: You are a concise on-device customer-support agent. Ask exactly one clarifying question when information is missing; never invent order IDs, prices, or policy text.
